name: Indicator of the floating rate—Leg 2
description: Reports the indicator of the interest rate reference rate for transactions, other than interest rate swaps, where Leg 2 is a floating rate interest rate leg.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for transactions, other than interest rate swaps, where Leg 2 is a floating rate interest rate leg (page 132, Condition table, paragraph 495).
If Asset class is not INTR or CURR, a value may be optionally reported (page 133, paragraph 502(a)(i)).
valueRules: If reported, the value is a code in the ISO 20022 code set ExternalBenchmarkCurveName1Code (page 133, paragraph 502(b)).
A value is not reported for the not-reported Action types (page 133, paragraph 502(c)).
Should not be reported if the actual floating rate reference rate does not properly fall within a ‘family’ within the ExternalBenchmarkCurveName1Code code set (page 132, paragraph 499).
